case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-11-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAR-07-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-22-2013. JUN-26-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF JUL-22-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
ARBITRATOR CLARKE BENBOW HOLLAND APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-22-2013 THROUGH OCT-20-2013.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
